data.title: chore: consolidate scripts — claude-todo/bin/ vs .skogai/scripts/ split
data.description:
## Problem

After today's reorg, executable scripts live in two places with overlapping purpose:

`claude-todo/bin/` (old, renamed from `bin/` via commit `f37d4ba`):

* `healthcheck`
* `claude-md-linecheck`
* `context.sh`, `context-git.sh`, `context-journal.sh`, `context-workspace.sh`
* `build-system-prompt.sh`
* `fetch-docs.sh`
* `find-agent-root.sh`

`.skogai/scripts/` (new):

* `bootstrap/` — `bootstrap.sh`, `consumer-init.sh`, `symlink.sh`
* `context/` — 20+ `context-*.sh` scripts (appears to be a superset of the claude-todo versions)
* `github/` — `README.md` only so far
* `utils/` — `migrate-journals.py`, `search.py`, `search.sh`, `state-status.py`, `wordcount.py`

## Why it matters

* **Hooks reference the wrong one.** `settings.json` hooks originally pointed at `/home/skogix/claude/bin/*` — I just redirected them to `claude-todo/bin/*` to stop them breaking, but that's the old tree.
* **Unclear which is canonical.** A new agent doesn't know whether to read/extend `claude-todo/` or `.skogai/scripts/`.
* `claude-todo/` is a strange name for what's really `bin/` — it reads like a TODO folder.
* **Root** `CLAUDE.md` structure section is stale. The tree diagram still shows `bin/` at root plus several other paths that moved in today's reorg (`.planning/` → `.skogai/plan/claude-home-migration/`, `tasks/` → `.skogai/tasks/`, etc.). New contributors will look for paths that don't exist.

## Proposal

1. Pick one canonical home for scripts — probably `.skogai/scripts/` + `.skogai/bin/` per issue [#36](https://linear.app/skogai/issue/SKO-171/feat-bin-shared-executables-for-agent-home)
2. Migrate the 9 files from `claude-todo/bin/` into the new location (most are already duplicated in `.skogai/scripts/context/`)
3. Delete `claude-todo/` or at minimum rename it
4. Update `settings.json` hooks to point at the canonical location
5. Add a router `CLAUDE.md` so future agents find it on first look
6. **Refresh the root** `CLAUDE.md` structure diagram to match the post-reorg tree (all moved paths, not just `bin/`)

## Related

* [#36](https://linear.app/skogai/issue/SKO-171/feat-bin-shared-executables-for-agent-home) (bin/ shared executables)
* [#32](https://linear.app/skogai/issue/SKO-167/feat-scriptscontext-context-generation-scripts) (scripts/context/ — already partially done)
* [#33](https://linear.app/skogai/issue/SKO-168/feat-scriptsbootstrap-init-and-symlink-setup) (scripts/bootstrap/ — already partially done)
* [SkogAI/claude#47](https://linear.app/skogai/review/fix-drop-hardcoded-skogix-paths-from-settingsjson-647a015489c3) (PR that surfaced the stale-docs concern via review)

## Problem

After today's reorg, executable scripts live in two places with overlapping purpose:

`claude-todo/bin/` (old, renamed from `bin/` via commit `f37d4ba`):

* `healthcheck`
* `claude-md-linecheck`
* `context.sh`, `context-git.sh`, `context-journal.sh`, `context-workspace.sh`
* `build-system-prompt.sh`
* `fetch-docs.sh`
* `find-agent-root.sh`

`.skogai/scripts/` (new):

* `bootstrap/` — `bootstrap.sh`, `consumer-init.sh`, `symlink.sh`
* `context/` — 20+ `context-*.sh` scripts (appears to be a superset of the claude-todo versions)
* `github/` — `README.md` only so far
* `utils/` — `migrate-journals.py`, `search.py`, `search.sh`, `state-status.py`, `wordcount.py`

## Why it matters

* **Hooks reference the wrong one.** `settings.json` hooks originally pointed at `/home/skogix/claude/bin/*` — I just redirected them to `claude-todo/bin/*` to stop them breaking, but that's the old tree.
* **Unclear which is canonical.** A new agent doesn't know whether to read/extend `claude-todo/` or `.skogai/scripts/`.
* `claude-todo/` is a strange name for what's really `bin/` — it reads like a TODO folder.

## Proposal

1. Pick one canonical home for scripts — probably `.skogai/scripts/` + `.skogai/bin/` per issue [#36](https://linear.app/skogai/issue/SKO-171/feat-bin-shared-executables-for-agent-home)
2. Migrate the 9 files from `claude-todo/bin/` into the new location (most are already duplicated in `.skogai/scripts/context/`)
3. Delete `claude-todo/` or at minimum rename it
4. Update `settings.json` hooks to point at the canonical location
5. Add a router `CLAUDE.md` so future agents find it on first look

## Related

* [#36](https://linear.app/skogai/issue/SKO-171/feat-bin-shared-executables-for-agent-home) (bin/ shared executables)
* [#32](https://linear.app/skogai/issue/SKO-167/feat-scriptscontext-context-generation-scripts) (scripts/context/ — already partially done)
* [#33](https://linear.app/skogai/issue/SKO-168/feat-scriptsbootstrap-init-and-symlink-setup) (scripts/bootstrap/ — already partially done)
